title: The Favor Of The Muses.
content:
Fame with the vulgar expires; but, Muse immortal, thou bearest
    Those whom thou lovest, who love thee, into Mnemosyne's arms.
meaning:
"The Favor Of The Muses." is a quintessential example of Friedrich Schiller's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
